line: - `~/.claude/sessions/*.json` is enough to drive PID discovery reliably when filtered through `sysinfo`.

line: - Matching by canonicalized `cwd` gives the right session for the current project; otherwise highest `startedAt` is a good fallback.

line: - The branch had unrelated `saw-core` parser drift; I fixed the missing sidechain/persisted-output fields so tests could pass cleanly.

line: - `cargo run -- watch --timeout-secs 1` auto-detected a live Claude session and selected a `membrain` session because there is currently no live `~/.claude/sessions/*.json` entry for this repo path.
